description: Defines the remediation reference contract governing resolution strategies for construction issues. Remediation references link issues to candidate solutions with confidence assessments. Runtime must validate remediation records against this contract and must not define its own strategies.
fail_closed_rule: Any remediation record with an unrecognized strategy must be rejected. Runtime must not invent remediation strategies.

add_missing_detail.label: Add Missing Detail
add_missing_detail.description: Create and add the missing construction detail to the drawing set.

substitute_material.label: Substitute Material
substitute_material.description: Replace the incompatible material with a compatible alternative.

add_interface_detail.label: Add Interface Detail
add_interface_detail.description: Create a detail drawing defining the unresolved interface connection.

resolve_scope_ownership.label: Resolve Scope Ownership
resolve_scope_ownership.description: Assign clear scope ownership through coordination meeting or specification amendment.

add_specification_parameter.label: Add Specification Parameter
add_specification_parameter.description: Add the missing parameter to the relevant specification section.

issue_rfi.label: Issue RFI
issue_rfi.description: Issue a Request for Information to the architect or engineer of record.

revise_drawing.label: Revise Drawing
revise_drawing.description: Issue a drawing revision addressing the identified issue.

coordinate_disciplines.label: Coordinate Disciplines
coordinate_disciplines.description: Conduct multi-discipline coordination to resolve interface or scope conflicts.

request_submittal.label: Request Submittal
request_submittal.description: Request product submittal or shop drawing from the responsible trade.

field_verification.label: Field Verification
field_verification.description: Conduct field verification to confirm existing conditions match design assumptions.

engineering_redesign.label: Engineering Redesign
engineering_redesign.description: Engage structural or specialty engineer for redesign of the affected assembly.

value_engineering_substitution.label: Value Engineering Substitution
value_engineering_substitution.description: Propose value engineering substitution to resolve material or method conflicts.

add_transition_detail.label: Add Transition Detail
add_transition_detail.description: Add a transition detail between dissimilar assemblies or materials.

install_continuous_flashing.label: Install Continuous Flashing
install_continuous_flashing.description: Add continuous flashing at the identified gap location.

add_termination_bar.label: Add Termination Bar
add_termination_bar.description: Install termination bar to mechanically secure membrane or flashing termination.

revise_slope_design.label: Revise Slope Design
revise_slope_design.description: Revise the slope-to-drain design to meet minimum drainage requirements.
